notes: HPE OneView configuration. Module name format is HPEOneView.<major><minor> for OneView <major>.<minor> library (e.g., HPEOneView.860 for OneView 8.60). See https://github.com/HewlettPackard/POSH-HPEOneView. iso_repository.base_url is an EXAMPLE value used for tests; in production supply -RepoBaseUrl to Start-PhysicalServerBuild at runtime.
